name: Lead Form Response and Initial Booking + ClickUp
description: Monitors a Google Sheet (connected to a lead intake form) for new submissions. When a new lead row is added, simultaneously sends a personalized confirmation email with a Calendly booking link AND creates a ClickUp task populated with all form data. Runs every minute.

parameters.subject: Thanks for reaching out to [YOUR BUSINESS NAME]
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json['1. Full name'] }},

Thank you for reaching out to [YOUR BUSINESS NAME]! I'm excited to learn more about your business ({{ $json['4. Business/Brand Name'] }}).

I've reviewed what you submitted and I'm already thinking through how I can help. The best next step is to book your free 20-minute strategy session so we can:

• Get clear on what you're trying to solve or build
• Identify the fastest path to a real solution
• Map out exactly what working together would look like

You can book a time that works best for you here: YOUR_CALENDLY_LINK

Once you're booked, I'll come prepared with specific ideas based on what you shared — so we can make the most of our time.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR BUSINESS NAME]
YOUR_WEBSITE_URL
